code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0

  while i <= n
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      b = 32
    end

    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45

    if is_digit
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else if is_minus and not have
      neg = true
    else
      if have
        mut v = val
        if neg
          v = 0 - val
        end
        let sq = v * v
        if first
          out = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sq}"
        end
        have = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
